summary: Reposted Fox News 'Hannity' interview segment. A three-way split-screen shows Congressman Andy Biggs at left, Stephen Miller center against a White House night backdrop, and Dan Bongino at right. A lower-third reads 'STILL NO SOLUTIONS FROM BIDEN ADMIN AMID WORSENING BORDER CONDITIONS,' with a 'Hannity' tag and a promo box. The audio is the panel discussing the border. The tweet describes the interview.

script.scene: Three-way Fox News 'Hannity' split-screen: Andy Biggs at left, Stephen Miller center, Dan Bongino at right; chyron 'STILL NO SOLUTIONS FROM BIDEN ADMIN AMID WORSENING BORDER CONDITIONS.'
